footer_brand_tagline: Empowering the future through innovative solutions and cutting-edge technology.
landing_hero_subtitle: Unlock the full potential of your Starlink connection with advanced networking powered by MikroTik routers. Seamlessly share your internet, secure it with VPN, and optimize for gaming and enterprise performance, all through NasNet Connect intelligent interface.
config_file_input_placeholder_openvpn: Paste your OpenVPN configuration here. The file should include directives like 'remote', 'proto', 'dev', etc.
config_file_input_placeholder_wireguard: Paste your Wireguard configuration here. The file should include [Interface] and [Peer] sections.
mobile_warning_description: This application is optimized for desktop devices. For the best experience, please access NASNET Connect from a computer or laptop.
mobile_warning_note: You can continue on mobile, but some features may not work as expected.
star_interface_type_section_description: Choose the type of connection for your trunk network
star_interface_type_warning_description: The following router(s) don't have Wi-Fi capability required for wireless trunk:
star_interface_type_warning_fallback: Please select routers with Wi-Fi capability or use wired trunk instead.
star_interface_type_warning_title: Wireless Router + Access Point Not Available
star_interface_type_wired_description: High-speed cable-based trunk connection for maximum performance
star_interface_type_wireless_description: Point-to-point wireless trunk for flexible deployments
wan_easy_password_help: Password must be at least 8 characters long
wan_easy_select_type_first: Please select an interface type first
vpn_config_input_placeholder_openvpn: Paste your OpenVPN configuration here. The file should include directives like 'remote', 'proto', 'dev', etc.
vpn_config_input_placeholder_wireguard: Paste your Wireguard configuration here. The file should include [Interface] and [Peer] sections.
vpn_config_file_section_description: Upload your {protocolName} configuration file ({acceptedExtensions}) or paste the configuration below.
vpn_config_file_section_helper: You can also drag & drop {protocolName} files ({acceptedExtensions}) directly into the text area
vpn_l2tp_connection_settings_description: Configure your L2TP VPN connection details
vpn_selector_description: Choose the VPN protocol that best suits your security and performance needs.
vpn_selector_l2tp_description: Widely supported protocol with IPSec encryption
vpn_selector_wireguard_description: Fast, modern VPN with state-of-the-art cryptography
vpn_client_easy_description: Your use of Starlink can be traced back to your identity. To enhance security and privacy, please configure a VPN to conceal your Starlink IP.
vpn_client_easy_disabled_description: Enable VPN Client above to configure your VPN connection settings.
vpn_client_easy_error_complete_correctly: Please complete the VPN configuration correctly before proceeding.
vpn_client_easy_error_save_failed: Failed to save VPN configuration. Please check your inputs and try again.
vpn_config_file_section_simple_helper: Paste or upload your {protocolName} configuration file.
star_container_help_choose_description: Choose your MikroTik router model and select the configuration approach that best fits your needs.
star_container_help_choose_getting_start: Select your MikroTik router model from our supported device list. This ensures the generated configuration is optimized for your specific hardware capabilities and features.
star_container_help_choose_configuration: Easy Mode provides simplified setup with essential features for home users. Advanced Mode offers full control over all router capabilities for professional deployments.
star_container_help_choose_router_model_: Choose the exact model of your MikroTik device. Different models have varying capabilities like port counts, wireless features, and processing power that affect the generated configuration.
star_container_help_wan_description: Configure your internet connection, multi-WAN setup, and VPN client settings for optimal connectivity and redundancy.
star_container_help_wan_internet_connect: Configure your primary internet connection settings including DHCP, static IP, or PPPoE. Ensure your ISP settings are correctly configured for reliable internet access.
star_container_help_wan_multi_wan_conten: Set up multiple internet connections for load balancing and failover. Configure domestic and foreign links with appropriate routing policies and traffic distribution.
star_container_help_wan_vpn_client_conte: Configure VPN client connections for routing traffic through VPN providers. Supports WireGuard, OpenVPN, L2TP, PPTP, SSTP, and IKEv2 protocols with automatic failover.
star_container_help_wan_connection_prior: Set connection priorities and weights to control how traffic is distributed across multiple WAN connections. Higher priority connections are preferred for critical traffic.
star_container_help_lan_description: Configure your local network segments, wireless settings, VPN servers, and security policies for optimal performance and security.
star_container_help_lan_network_segmenta: Set up multiple network segments including Split (192.168.10.0/24), Domestic (192.168.20.0/24), Foreign (192.168.30.0/24), and VPN (192.168.40.0/24) networks with appropriate routing rules.
star_container_help_lan_wireless_configu: Configure WiFi networks with proper security settings, guest networks, and bandwidth limitations. Set up multiple SSIDs for different user groups with appropriate access policies.
star_container_help_lan_vpn_server_conte: Configure VPN servers for remote access including WireGuard, OpenVPN, L2TP/IPSec, PPTP, SSTP, and IKEv2. Set up user authentication and access policies for secure remote connectivity.
star_container_help_lan_network_tunnelin: Set up network tunnels (GRE, VXLAN, EoIP, IPIP) for connecting remote sites or creating overlay networks. Configure tunnel parameters and routing for seamless connectivity.
star_container_help_extra_config_descrip: Configure advanced features including gaming optimization, DDNS, system maintenance, and other professional-grade networking features.
star_container_help_extra_config_gaming_: Set up game-specific routing rules and port forwarding for popular games. Configure QoS policies to prioritize gaming traffic and reduce latency for optimal gaming performance.
star_container_help_extra_config_dynamic: Configure DDNS services to maintain access to your router even with changing IP addresses. Supports multiple DDNS providers for reliable remote access and services.
star_container_help_extra_config_system_: Set up automatic system updates, scheduled reboots, and maintenance tasks. Configure backup schedules and system monitoring for reliable operation.
star_container_help_extra_config_advance: Configure additional services like NTP servers, certificate management, and cloud integrations. These features are available in Advanced mode for professional deployments.
star_container_help_show_config_descript: Review, download, and deploy your generated MikroTik router configuration. Verify all settings before applying to your router.
star_container_help_show_config_configur: Review the generated configuration script to ensure all settings match your requirements. Check network segments, routing rules, firewall policies, and service configurations.
star_container_help_show_config_deployme: Download the configuration as a .rsc file for manual application, or copy the commands for direct RouterOS terminal use. Always backup your current configuration before applying changes.
star_container_help_show_config_applying: Connect to your MikroTik router via WinBox, WebFig, or SSH. Import the configuration file or paste commands into the terminal. Verify connectivity after applying changes.
star_container_help_show_config_safety_p: Always backup your current configuration before applying changes. Test the configuration on a non-production device first. Keep physical access to reset the router if needed.
star_router_mode_section_description: Choose how you want your router to operate in your network
star_router_mode_trunk_footer: Requires 2 routers (you'll select the second router next)
star_router_mode_trunk_next: A second router will be selected in the next step
newsletter_choose_completion_description: Thank you for using NASNET Connect! Subscribe to receive product updates, new features, and exclusive offers.
newsletter_choose_completion_privacy: Join thousands of users. Unsubscribe anytime.
newsletter_choose_description: Get the latest product updates, new features, and important announcements delivered directly to your inbox.
newsletter_error_invalid_email: Please enter a valid email address
newsletter_error_subscribe_failed: Failed to subscribe. Please try again.
newsletter_privacy_notice: We respect your privacy. Unsubscribe at any time.
newsletter_success_description: Check your email to confirm and activate your subscription.
newsletter_title_default: Stay Connected by subscribing to our newsletter
newsletter_title_description: Subscribe to get the latest router configuration tips, security updates, and exclusive content.
reboot_conflict: {first} and {second} must be at least 15 minutes apart.
reboot_notice_description: Internet connectivity may be temporarily interrupted during scheduled reboot, update, and IP address list synchronization times. Please plan accordingly.
services_confirm_intro: You are about to change the port for
services_ssh_port_warning: Changing the SSH port from the default (22) may affect your ability to connect to the router. Make sure you remember the new port number.
services_warning_body: When you change service ports, you will need the new port numbers to connect to your router. Make sure to document them in a safe place.
services_warning_intro: This warning will only appear once. Please take note of:
services_warning_item_access: You'll need them to access your router services
services_warning_item_lockout: Losing port numbers may lock you out of certain services
services_warning_item_save: Save them in a secure location
services_warning_item_write: Write down all custom port numbers
services_warning_title: Always remember or write down the new port numbers!
services_web_port_note: You will need to specify the port number in the URL when accessing the web interface.
state_viewer_context_generated_for_route: Configuration will be generated for the selected router
state_viewer_context_no_routers: No routers configured. Please configure routers in Trunk Mode with Master and Slave routers to use this feature.
state_viewer_router_upload_cta: Click to upload or drag and drop
stepper_help_button_shortcut_title: Get help for this step (Press ? key)
show_config_advanced_subtitle: Generated MikroTik RouterOS script ready for deployment
show_config_documentation_description: Everything you need to master your router configuration
show_config_documentation_faq_answer_bac: Use the command '/system backup save dont-encrypt=yes name="backup-filename"' in the terminal or through Winbox before applying any new configuration.
show_config_documentation_faq_answer_fir: Check for updates monthly and apply stable releases. Always backup before updating and test in a non-production environment first.
show_config_documentation_faq_answer_mul: Yes, but ensure the router models are compatible and adjust interface names if they differ between devices.
show_config_documentation_faq_answer_not: If you experience issues, you can restore your backup using '/system backup load name="backup-filename"' or perform a factory reset if needed.
show_config_documentation_faq_descriptio: Common questions and answers about router configuration
show_config_documentation_faq_question_b: How do I backup my current configuration before applying the new one?
show_config_documentation_faq_question_f: How often should I update my router firmware?
show_config_documentation_faq_question_m: Can I apply this configuration to multiple routers?
show_config_documentation_faq_question_n: What should I do if the configuration doesn't work?
show_config_documentation_help_descripti: If you can't find what you're looking for in our documentation or FAQ, our support team is here to help you with your router configuration.
show_config_documentation_item_docs_desc: Comprehensive guides and tutorials for router configuration and troubleshooting
show_config_documentation_item_quick_set: Step-by-step guide to get your router configured and running quickly
show_config_documentation_item_telegram_: Join our Telegram community for support and discussions
show_config_documentation_item_video_des: Visual learning resources and video guides for router configuration
show_config_easy_description: Download the configuration file and apply it to your MikroTik router using the instructions below. Make sure to backup your current settings before proceeding.
show_config_easy_step_apply_description: Run the script on your router
show_config_easy_success: Your router configuration has been generated successfully
show_config_newsletter_description: Get the latest MikroTik tips, security updates, and configuration best practices delivered to your inbox.
show_config_master_description: Master router configuration with complete network setup and routing rules
show_config_preview_description: Below you'll find your generated configuration. Use the MikroTik script below to apply these settings.
show_config_slave_description: Slave router configuration ready for deployment on your secondary MikroTik device
star_setup_mode_advanced_description: Full-featured multi-WAN configuration wizard. Perfect for complex network setups with multiple internet connections.
star_setup_mode_easy_description: Simplified setup with basic options. Perfect for beginners and standard home network configurations.
star_setup_mode_section_description: Select the setup mode that best fits your needs and experience level
landing_footer_company_description: Professional MikroTik router configuration made simple. Transform your network infrastructure with our intelligent configuration wizard.
landing_footer_newsletter_description: Get the latest features, tutorials, and network optimization tips.
landing_features_router_support_descript: From hAP series to Chateau models, configure any MikroTik router with intelligent model detection and capability mapping.
landing_features_advanced_vpn_descriptio: Complete VPN solution with WireGuard, OpenVPN, L2TP, PPTP, SSTP, and IKeV2. Both server and client configurations.
landing_features_gaming_description: Built-in gaming database with automatic port forwarding and traffic prioritization for popular games.
landing_features_multi_wan_description: Configure multiple WAN connections with intelligent routing, failover, and domestic/foreign link separation.
landing_features_wireless_description: Advanced wireless configuration with multiple SSIDs, guest networks, and enterprise-grade security.
landing_features_network_segments_descri: Create secure network segments: VPN, Domestic, Foreign, and Split networks with intelligent routing rules.
landing_router_models_section_descriptio: From entry-level home routers to enterprise-grade equipment, configure any MikroTik device with intelligent model detection.
landing_vpn_protocols_wireguard_descript: Modern, fast, and secure VPN protocol with minimal configuration overhead
landing_vpn_protocols_openvpn_descriptio: Industry standard SSL/TLS VPN with excellent compatibility and security
landing_vpn_protocols_l2tp_description: Layer 2 Tunneling Protocol with IPSec encryption for enterprise security
landing_vpn_protocols_ikev2_description: Internet Key Exchange version 2 with excellent mobile device support
landing_vpn_protocols_sstp_description: Secure Socket Tunneling Protocol with firewall traversal capabilities
landing_vpn_protocols_pptp_description: Point-to-Point Tunneling Protocol for legacy device compatibility
landing_vpn_bottom_enterprise_security_d: Military-grade encryption with certificate management and advanced authentication methods.
landing_vpn_bottom_high_performance_desc: Optimized for speed with hardware acceleration and efficient packet processing.
landing_vpn_bottom_global_access_descrip: Secure remote access from anywhere with intelligent routing and failover support.
dns_description: Configure DNS servers and security settings for each network
dns_default_state_description: The following default DNS servers will be used. Enable DNS configuration above to customize these settings.
dns_notice_description: Configure custom DNS servers for each network segment. These settings will override default DNS configurations and can improve performance, security, and content filtering.
dns_doh_disabled_notice: DNS over HTTPS (DOH) is currently disabled. This feature is temporarily unavailable.
dns_doh_domain_help: Enter the domain for DNS over HTTPS service (e.g., cloudflare-dns.com)
dns_binding_ip_help: Optional: Bind DOH to specific IP address for this network
dns_doh_domestic_description: Secure DNS resolution for domestic network traffic
dns_doh_vpn_description: Secure DNS resolution for VPN network traffic
dns_foreign_description: DNS server for foreign network traffic
dns_vpn_description: DNS server for VPN network traffic
dns_split_description: DNS server for split network traffic
dns_domestic_description: DNS server for domestic network traffic
dns_invalid_ipv4: Please enter a valid IPv4 address
subnets_description: Configure IP subnets for your network segments with smart validation and conflict detection
subnets_default_description: The following default subnets will be used. Enable subnet configuration above to customize these values.
subnets_tab_base_description: Core network segments for your router configuration
subnets_tab_wan_domestic_description: Multiple domestic WAN link subnets for routing segregation
subnets_tab_wan_foreign_description: Multiple foreign WAN link subnets for international routing
subnets_tab_vpn_client_description: Dedicated subnets for multiple VPN client connections
subnets_tab_vpn_server_description: Dedicated subnets for VPN client connections
subnets_notice_body: We've established a systematic subnet configuration that helps organize and manage your network effectively. These values follow best practices for network segmentation and routing.
subnets_notice_warning: Warning: Only modify these settings if you have technical networking knowledge. Incorrect subnet values may cause network connectivity issues and routing problems.
subnets_empty_category_description: No configurations available for this category. Configure the related features in previous steps to see subnet options here.
subnets_conflicts_single: One subnet in this section conflicts with another:
subnets_conflicts_multiple: {count} subnets in this section have conflicts:
vpn_server_network_helper: Choose which network segment this VPN protocol should be accessible from.
vpn_server_peer_configuration_descriptio: WireGuard peers are automatically configured based on the users you create in the Users step. Each user will get their own peer configuration with appropriate keys and allowed addresses.
vpn_server_certificate_configuration_des: Server certificates and security settings are configured in the Certificate step. This ensures consistent certificate management across all protocols that require them.
vpn_server_ikev2_certificate_description: IKEv2 server certificates are configured in the Certificate step when using digital signature authentication. This ensures consistent certificate management across all protocols.
vpn_server_users_openvpn_format_intro: OpenVPN usernames will be created in the format:
vpn_server_users_description: Create user accounts that will be able to connect to your VPN server. Each user needs a unique username and a strong password.
vpn_server_users_validation: Please complete all user information. Each user must have a unique username and a password of at least 8 characters.
vpn_server_certificate_security_descript: Create a secure passphrase to protect your VPN server certificate's private key.

vpn_client_advanced_select_type_first: Please select a VPN type first
vpn_client_advanced_required_fields: Fill in all required fields for the {type} connection. Fields marked with * are required.
vpn_client_advanced_more_clients_needed_: You need {count} more VPN client(s) to match your Foreign WAN links.

vpn_client_advanced_step_strategy_descri: Configure VPN strategy and set connection priorities
vpn_client_advanced_step_review_descript: Review and confirm your VPN configuration
vpn_client_advanced_page_description: Configure multiple VPN clients with advanced networking features

vpn_client_advanced_connection_name_plac: Enter a custom name for this VPN connection
vpn_client_advanced_fill_required_fields: Please fill in all required fields to complete configuration
vpn_client_advanced_redundancy_hint: Each foreign WAN link should have at least one VPN client configured for optimal redundancy.
vpn_client_advanced_wan_interface_descri: Select which WAN interface this VPN will use for connection
vpn_client_advanced_no_wan_interfaces: No WAN interfaces available. Please configure WAN links first.
vpn_client_advanced_choose_protocol_desc: Choose a VPN protocol for your connection
vpn_client_advanced_select_protocol_to_c: Please select a VPN protocol to continue
vpn_selector_pptp_description: Legacy protocol, fast but less secure
vpn_client_advanced_failover_hint: If the primary VPN fails, traffic automatically switches to the next available VPN.
vpn_client_advanced_rotation_hint: How often to switch between VPN connections
vpn_client_advanced_load_balance_method_: Choose how traffic will be distributed across multiple VPN connections
vpn_client_advanced_load_balance_weights: Adjust traffic distribution percentage for each VPN
vpn_client_advanced_load_balance_active_: Adjust traffic distribution for active VPNs
vpn_client_advanced_combined_strategy_he: Combines load balancing with automatic failover. Traffic is distributed across active connections, with backup VPNs ready when primary connections fail.
vpn_client_advanced_priority_order_help: Drag and drop VPNs to set their priority order. Higher priority VPNs will be preferred.
vpn_client_advanced_summary_description: Review your VPN configuration before deploying to your router
vpn_client_advanced_configuration_issues: Please review and fix the issues before proceeding.
vpn_client_advanced_wireguard_config_pla: Paste your WireGuard configuration here. It should include sections like [Interface] and [Peer].
vpn_client_advanced_validation_min_clien: At least {count} VPN client(s) required (based on Foreign WAN links)
vpn_client_advanced_validation_names_uni: VPN client names must be unique
vpn_client_advanced_validation_strategy_: Multi-VPN strategy is required when using multiple VPN clients
vpn_client_advanced_validation_failover_: Failover check interval must be at least 5 seconds
Failover timeout must be at least 10 seconds
vpn_client_advanced_validation_prioritie: VPN client priorities must be unique and sequential
vpn_client_advanced_fix_validation_befor: Please fix validation errors before applying configuration
vpn_client_advanced_ready_to_apply: All configurations are valid and ready to apply
vpn_client_advanced_review_save_complete: Review your configuration above. When ready, click "Save & Complete" to apply the VPN settings to your router configuration.
vpn_client_advanced_legacy_add_descripti: Add and configure VPN clients. Minimum {count} VPN client(s) required for foreign WAN links.
vpn_client_advanced_legacy_minimum_warni: You need at least {requiredCount} VPN client(s) for your foreign WAN links. Currently configured: {currentCount}

vpn_client_advanced_clients_configured_s: {count} VPN client(s) configured. You can proceed to Step 2 to configure connection details.
vpn_client_advanced_manage_priority_desc: Manage your VPN client configurations and their priority order
vpn_client_advanced_complete_steps_befor: Please complete Steps 1 and 2 before reviewing your configuration.
vpn_client_advanced_select_protocol_for_: Select a VPN protocol to configure connection settings
vpn_client_advanced_priority_order_note: Lower numbers have higher priority (1 = highest priority)
vpn_client_advanced_enable_or_disable_co: Enable or disable this VPN connection
vpn_client_advanced_configuration_fields: Configuration fields will appear here based on your protocol choice
vpn_client_advanced_failover_selector_de: Use one VPN at a time, switch to backup when primary fails
vpn_client_advanced_round_robin_selector: Balance traffic across all VPNs for maximum speed
vpn_client_advanced_service_connection_i: May cause connection issues with some services
vpn_client_advanced_priority_selector_de: Use VPNs in order of priority, manually control switching
vpn_client_advanced_strategy_together_de: Choose how multiple VPN connections should work together
vpn_server_header_description: Set up your VPN server settings and user access
vpn_server_step_protocols_description: Choose which VPN protocols you want to enable on your router.
vpn_server_step_configuration_descriptio: Configure the settings for each enabled VPN protocol.
vpn_server_step_users_description: Create user accounts that can connect to your VPN server.
vpn_server_disabled_description: VPN Server is currently disabled. Enable it using the toggle above to configure VPN server settings.
vpn_server_certificate_description: Configure certificates and security settings for VPN protocols that require them: {protocols}.
vpn_server_certificate_key_helper: Secure passphrase to protect the certificate private key (minimum 10 characters)
vpn_server_certificate_usage_openvpn: OpenVPN will use this certificate for TLS encryption and client authentication
vpn_server_certificate_usage_sstp: SSTP will use this certificate for HTTPS/SSL connections
vpn_server_certificate_usage_ikev2: IKEv2 will use this certificate for digital signature authentication
vpn_openvpn_config_placeholder_full:
Paste your OpenVPN configuration here. It should include directives like 'remote', 'proto', 'dev', etc.

Example:
client
dev tun
proto udp
remote vpn.example.com 1194
auth-user-pass
cipher AES-256-GCM
auth SHA256
vpn_openvpn_key_passphrase_placeholder: Optional passphrase for certificate private key
vpn_openvpn_key_passphrase_file_help: Required if your .ovpn file contains an encrypted private key
vpn_openvpn_key_passphrase_manual_help: Leave empty if your certificate doesn't require a passphrase
vpn_openvpn_easy_routeros_support_descri: RouterOS has specialized OpenVPN implementation with specific capabilities. Our intelligent parser automatically detects and handles compatibility requirements.
vpn_openvpn_easy_compatibility_issues_de: Your configuration contains features that aren't supported by RouterOS and will be automatically ignored or adapted:
vpn_openvpn_easy_fix_import_certificates: Import certificates manually in RouterOS certificate store
vpn_openvpn_easy_config_file_description: Upload or paste your .ovpn file. We'll automatically validate RouterOS compatibility.
vpn_openvpn_easy_auth_method_description: Your configuration doesn't specify an authentication method. Please choose how you want to authenticate with the VPN server.
vpn_openvpn_easy_auth_credentials_descri: Use your VPN service username and password for authentication. Most common method.
vpn_openvpn_easy_auth_certificate_descri: Use client certificates for authentication. More secure but requires certificate management.
vpn_openvpn_easy_auth_both_description: Maximum security using both username/password and client certificates. Dual authentication.
vpn_openvpn_easy_missing_config_descript: Your configuration file is missing some required information. Please provide the missing details below.
vpn_openvpn_easy_connection_description: Configure the basic connection parameters for your OpenVPN server
vpn_openvpn_easy_server_address_help: Domain name or IP address of your VPN server
vpn_openvpn_easy_protocol_help: UDP is faster, TCP is more reliable through firewalls
vpn_openvpn_easy_auth_type_help: Most VPN providers use username/password authentication
vpn_openvpn_easy_certificate_auth_descri: For certificate-based authentication, you'll need to manually import your certificates into RouterOS's certificate store using the Files → Certificates section in WinBox or the certificate import commands.
vpn_openvpn_easy_encryption_description: Configure the encryption parameters (leave default for most providers)
vpn_openvpn_easy_auth_hash_help: Supported: md5, sha1, sha256, sha512, null (use null for GCM ciphers)
vpn_openvpn_easy_help_footer: Fields marked with * are required • Need help? Check your VPN provider's RouterOS setup guide
vpn_server_easy_step_certificate_descrip: Configure certificate passphrase for secure VPN access.
vpn_server_easy_step_users_description: Create user accounts for VPN access.
vpn_server_easy_openvpn_passphrase_help: Creates both TCP and UDP OpenVPN servers with this passphrase
vpn_server_easy_pptp_description: PPTP VPN server is configured. Advanced configuration is available in expert mode.
vpn_server_easy_ipsec_secret_help: Key used for encrypting L2TP/IPsec connections
vpn_server_easy_wireguard_description: WireGuard VPN server is configured. Advanced configuration is available in expert mode.
vpn_server_easy_sstp_description: SSTP VPN server is configured. Advanced configuration is available in expert mode.
vpn_server_easy_passphrase_min: Passphrase must be at least 10 characters
vpn_server_easy_password_min: Password must be at least 8 characters
vpn_server_easy_ikev2_preshared_key_help: Key must be at least 8 characters long for security
vpn_server_ikev2_preshared_key_required: Pre-shared key is required for this authentication method
vpn_server_ikev2_preshared_key_min: Pre-shared key should be at least 8 characters long
vpn_server_ikev2_certificate_required: Certificate is required for this authentication method
vpn_server_username_exists_different: Username already exists. Please choose a different username.
vpn_pptp_connection_description: Configure your PPTP VPN connection details
vpn_sstp_connection_description: Configure your SSTP VPN connection details
vpn_ikev2_auth_method_description: Select how you want to authenticate with the VPN server
vpn_ikev2_phase1_description: Configure security parameters for the initial connection
vpn_ikev2_phase2_description: Configure security parameters for the secure communication tunnel
useful_services_easy_certificate_descrip: Manage SSL/TLS certificates for secure connections
useful_services_easy_ntp_description: Synchronize time across your network devices
useful_services_easy_ddns_description: Dynamic DNS service for remote access
useful_services_easy_description: Quick enable/disable services for your network
star_wan_link_section_description: Choose your internet connection setup for optimal routing
star_wan_link_domestic_description: Connect using only domestic internet connection
star_wan_link_domestic_feature_optimized: Optimized for local content and services
star_wan_link_domestic_feature_limited: May have limited access to some foreign content
star_wan_link_foreign_description: Connect using only foreign internet connection
star_wan_link_foreign_feature_access: Access to both domestic and international content
star_wan_link_foreign_feature_local_serv: May have slower access to local services
star_wan_link_both_description: Optimal routing with both domestic and foreign connections
star_wan_link_both_feature_routing: Intelligent traffic routing based on destination
star_wan_link_both_feature_performance: Best performance for both local and international content
wireless_step_disabled_notice: Wireless networking is currently disabled. Enable it using the toggle above to configure wireless settings.
wireless_header_ssid_warning: Please avoid using the following words in your SSID as they may indicate the type of network: "star", "starlink", "VPN", "Iran", etc.
wireless_single_description: Configure a single SSID for all networks
wireless_single_note: Note: Both Network Name and Password are required to save your configuration.
wireless_multi_no_additional_networks: No additional networks available. Configure extra WAN links, VPN clients, or tunnels to add more wireless interfaces.
wireless_multi_note: Note: At least one network must remain enabled. Fill all required fields for enabled networks.
wireless_network_description_foreign: Dedicated network for Foreign internet traffic
wireless_card_base_network_disabled_desc: This base network is disabled. Enable it in the network configuration first.
wireless_extra_bridged_to: This wireless interface will be bridged to
router_model_custom_description: Configure your own router with custom interfaces and specifications
router_slave_custom_description: Add a custom slave router with specific interfaces
router_slave_help_text: You can select multiple slave routers to expand your network capacity
router_custom_error_name_length: Router name must be 50 characters or less
router_custom_error_interface_required: Router must have at least one interface
router_custom_error_ethernet_count: Ethernet count must be between 0 and 32
router_custom_error_wireless_count: Wireless count must be between 0 and 5
router_custom_error_sfp_count: SFP count must be between 0 and 32
router_custom_error_lte_count: LTE count must be between 0 and 5
router_custom_modal_description: Define your router's interfaces and specifications
router_custom_no_ethernet: No ethernet interfaces configured. Click "Add Ethernet" to add one.
router_custom_no_wireless: No wireless interfaces configured. Click "Add Wireless" to add one.
router_custom_no_sfp: No SFP interfaces configured. Click "Add SFP" to add one.
router_details_starlink_mini_yes: Perfect for Starlink Mini dish with LTE connectivity
router_details_starlink_mini_no: Requires LTE capability for Starlink Mini compatibility
router_details_no_domestic_link_yes: Great for areas without domestic DSL/cable with mobile connectivity
router_details_no_domestic_link_no: Requires mobile connectivity for areas without domestic links
router_details_docker_ready_yes: Sufficient CPU and RAM for running Docker containers and applications
router_details_docker_ready_no: Requires 1GB+ RAM and quad-core CPU for reliable Docker operation
router_details_usb_port_yes: USB port available for external storage, 3G/4G modems, or other devices
router_details_usb_port_no: No USB port available for external devices
router_details_two_five_g_yes: 2.5 Gigabit Ethernet port for high-speed wired connections and future-proofing
trunk_interface_section_description: Select the specific interfaces for your trunk connection
trunk_wireless_band_description: Choose the frequency band for your wireless trunk connection. All routers will use the same band.
trunk_wireless_band_24_description: Longer range, better penetration through walls
trunk_wireless_band_none_description: The selected routers don't share any common wireless bands. Wireless trunk requires all routers to support the same band.
trunk_interface_choose_both: Choose interfaces on both routers for trunk connection
trunk_interface_choose_single: Choose the interface for the connection
trunk_interface_complete_prompt: Select interfaces on both routers to complete configuration
trunk_multi_description: Map each slave router to a master interface
identity_settings_description: Configure router identity and remote access
identity_romon_description: Enable or disable Remote Network Monitoring (RoMON) for centralized management
game_config_description: Manage game routing and port configuration
game_config_warning: Port configurations sourced from portforward.com are provided without verification.
zerotier_network_id_help: Enter your 16-digit ZeroTier network ID from your ZeroTier Central account.
zerotier_package_required_description: You must install the ZeroTier package on your MikroTik router before importing this configuration. Visit the MikroTik package repository to download and install the zerotier package.
zerotier_information: ZeroTier creates a secure, peer-to-peer virtual network that works anywhere.
prefixed_both_port_identifier: Port identifier for both TCP and UDP (e.g., "80", "443")
vpn_server_backtohome_description: BackToHome provides secure remote access to your home network from anywhere in the world.
vpn_server_ssh_description: SSH Server uses the standard SSH port 22 for secure remote access.
vpn_server_socks5_port_help: Default Socks5 port is 1080. Valid range is 1-65535.
vpn_server_http_proxy_port_help: Default HTTP Proxy port is 8080. Valid range is 1-65535.
vpn_server_http_proxy_no_ips: No IP addresses configured. Click "Add IP" to allow specific networks or hosts.
vpn_server_http_proxy_allowed_ips_help: Enter IP addresses or CIDR ranges (e.g., 192.168.1.0/24, 10.0.0.1). Only these IPs will be allowed to use the proxy.
vpn_server_sstp_certificate_security_des: SSTP certificates and security settings are configured in the Certificate step. This ensures consistent certificate management and security configuration across all protocols.
shared_passphrase_min_10: Passphrase must be at least 10 characters long
vpn_server_wireguard_interface_address_r: Valid interface address with subnet is required (e.g., 192.168.110.1/24)
vpn_server_wireguard_interface_address_i: Valid interface address with subnet is required
vpn_server_l2tp_ipsec_secret_required: IPsec secret is required when IPsec is enabled
useful_services_certificate_description: Configure SSL/TLS certificates for secure network communications
useful_services_certificate_required_war: Certificate required: You have VPN servers (SSTP, OpenVPN, or IKEv2) enabled that require SSL certificates.
useful_services_certificate_types_descri: Enable the types of certificates you want to use
useful_services_certificate_passphrase_d: Enter a passphrase to protect your self-signed certificate
useful_services_certificate_passphrase_h: This passphrase will be used to encrypt your certificate for secure export to VPN clients.
useful_services_ntp_description: Configure multiple NTP servers for accurate time synchronization across your network
useful_services_ntp_servers_description: Add multiple NTP servers for redundancy and accuracy
useful_services_description: Configure advanced network services with detailed settings and modern interface for optimal performance
useful_services_graphing_description: Enable comprehensive network monitoring with real-time graphs and performance analytics
useful_services_graphing_choose_descript: Select the types of network data you want to monitor and visualize
useful_services_upnp_description: Enable Universal Plug and Play for automatic port forwarding and device discovery
useful_services_upnp_enable_description: Allow devices to automatically configure network settings
useful_services_upnp_choose_link_type_de: Select the type of network connection where UPnP will be enabled
useful_services_upnp_vpn_warning_intro: When using UPnP over VPN connections, ensure that:
useful_services_upnp_vpn_warning_forward: Your VPN server supports UPnP protocol forwarding
useful_services_upnp_vpn_warning_multica: The VPN tunnel allows UPnP multicast traffic
useful_services_upnp_vpn_warning_remote_: Remote devices can communicate through the VPN
useful_services_upnp_vpn_warning_footer: UPnP may not work properly with all VPN configurations.
useful_services_ddns_description: Configure multiple DDNS providers to maintain consistent domain access
useful_services_ddns_enable_description: Maintain a consistent domain name despite IP changes
useful_services_ddns_add_entry_descripti: Configure a new Dynamic DNS provider
useful_services_ddns_update_interval_hel: How often to check for IP changes
useful_services_ddns_custom_url_helper: Enter the full URL for your DDNS update endpoint
useful_services_ddns_password_helper: Your service password or API token
useful_services_natpmp_description: Configure NAT Port Mapping Protocol for automatic port forwarding and NAT traversal
useful_services_natpmp_enable_descriptio: Enable Network Address Translation Port Mapping Protocol
useful_services_natpmp_select_interface_: Choose one network interface where NAT-PMP will be enabled
useful_services_natpmp_no_interfaces_des: No WAN links or VPN clients have been configured yet. Please configure at least one WAN link or VPN client in the previous steps before enabling NAT-PMP.
useful_services_natpmp_no_selection_desc: Please select an interface to enable NAT-PMP on, or disable NAT-PMP if not needed.
tunnel_header_description: Configure network tunnels for connecting remote networks
tunnel_enable_step_description: Configure network tunnels for connecting remote network segments
tunnel_enable_step_prompt: Please select your desired tunnel protocol in the next step.
tunnel_step_select_protocol_description: Choose the tunnel protocol you want to configure.
tunnel_step_ipip_description: Configure IP over IP tunnels to connect remote networks.
tunnel_step_eoip_description: Configure Ethernet over IP tunnels for bridging remote Ethernet segments.
tunnel_step_vxlan_description: Configure Virtual Extensible LAN tunnels for scaling network overlays.
tunnel_step_summary_description: Review your tunnel configuration before saving.
tunnel_disabled_message: Network tunneling is currently disabled. Enable it using the toggle above to configure tunnel settings.
tunnel_step_skipped: Network tunnels are disabled. This step is skipped.
tunnel_ipip_detail_description: Configure IP-in-IP tunnels to encapsulate IP packets inside IP packets
tunnel_gre_detail_description: Configure Generic Routing Encapsulation tunnels for protocol-agnostic tunneling
tunnel_no_ipip_configured: No IPIP tunnels configured. Click "Add Tunnel" to create one.
tunnel_no_eoip_configured: No EOIP tunnels configured. Click "Add Tunnel" to create one.
tunnel_no_gre_configured: No GRE tunnels configured. Click "Add Tunnel" to create one.
tunnel_vxlan_detail_description: Configure Virtual Extensible LAN tunnels for large-scale network virtualization
tunnel_no_vxlan_configured: No VXLAN tunnels configured. Click "Add Tunnel" to create one.
landing_gaming_description: Zero-lag gaming with comprehensive game database. Automatic port forwarding, traffic prioritization, and ping optimization for competitive gaming.
landing_load_balance_algo_ecmp_desc: Load balancing across equal cost paths
landing_load_balance_algo_bonding_desc: Combines multiple links into single pipe
landing_load_balance_description: Advanced algorithms for optimal performance. Ensure high availability with intelligent traffic distribution and automatic failover protection.
landing_tunnels_ipip_desc: IP over IP encapsulation for simple tunneling
landing_tunnels_eoip_desc: Ethernet over IP for Layer 2 connectivity
landing_tunnels_description: Professional tunneling with IPIP, EoIP, GRE, and VXLAN protocols. Create site-to-site connections with enterprise-grade security.
landing_vpn_server_description: Multi-protocol server supporting 11 VPN types. Enable remote access, content freedom through foreign links, and secure connectivity worldwide.
landing_multiwan_description: Domestic + Foreign links with intelligent routing. Experience optimal performance with geographic-based traffic distribution and automatic failover protection.
landing_multiwan_smart_routing_desc: Automatically routes traffic through optimal links based on destination
landing_multiwan_link_redundancy_desc: 2-8 WAN links support with automatic failover and load balancing
landing_multiwan_geo_optimization_desc: Separate domestic and foreign traffic for optimal performance
landing_router_chain_description: Master-Slave architecture for seamless network expansion. Connect multiple routers to extend coverage, increase capacity, and create unified wireless networks.
landing_router_chain_extended_range_desc: Expand coverage area with multiple access points
landing_router_chain_roaming_desc: Automatic handoff between routers without disconnection
landing_router_chain_unified_control_des: Manage all routers from a single master interface
landing_vpn_client_description: Military-grade encryption with 6 VPN protocols. Enhanced privacy, secure connections, and anonymous browsing capabilities for all your devices.
landing_port_forwarding_description: Seamless device access with UPNP, NAT-PMP, and manual configuration. Auto discovery, manual rules, and comprehensive port management.
landing_wireless_description: Purpose-built networks with intelligent segmentation. Create isolated networks for different purposes with bandwidth control and routing rules.
lan_einterface_description: Configure Ethernet interfaces and assign them to network bridges
lan_einterface_config_description: All available interfaces will be assigned to network bridges
vpn_server_protocol_warning: Please enable at least one VPN protocol to continue.
vpn_server_certificate_step_description: Configure certificates for VPN protocols that require them
vpn_server_protocol_config_empty: No VPN protocols are currently enabled. Return to the previous step to select at least one protocol to configure.
vpn_server_passphrase_min: Passphrase must be at least 10 characters
vpn_server_port_reserved: Port {port} is reserved for system services
wan_advanced_links_description: Configure multiple WAN connections for load balancing and failover
wan_advanced_create_first_foreign: Create your first foreign WAN connection. You can add multiple links for load balancing and failover.
wan_advanced_create_first_domestic: Create your first domestic WAN connection. You can add multiple links for load balancing and failover.
wan_advanced_link_name_placeholder: Enter a custom name for this WAN link
wan_advanced_easy_hint: In Easy Mode, DHCP connection type will be used by default. Switch to Advanced Mode for more options.
wan_advanced_step_link_foreign_desc: Configure foreign WAN interfaces and settings
wan_advanced_step_link_domestic_desc: Configure domestic WAN interfaces and settings
wan_advanced_step_connection_foreign_des: Configure foreign connection types and settings
wan_advanced_step_connection_domestic_de: Configure domestic connection types and settings
wan_advanced_header_description: Configure multiple WAN connections with advanced networking features
wan_advanced_review_before_deploy: Review your WAN configuration before deploying to your router
wan_advanced_validated_successfully: Your WAN configuration has been validated successfully.
